titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1010
GA 1010
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: ινα at 6.39 moved to v.40 by David Parker.
Word break at 5.4 corrected by David Parker.
Correction deleted at 7.39 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 8.23 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 8.23 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 5.4 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word at end of 8.54 moved to beginning of 8.55 by Rachel Kevern.
Breathing removed from υμιν at 5.38 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break changed at 8.43 by Rachel Kevern.
Correction changed to * λαλω C* λελαληκα at 14.10 by Rachel Kevern.
Verse break moved at 6.39-40 by David Parker.
Iota adscript removed, word break changed at 3.23 by David Parker.
Word breaks at 2.20, 5.5 corrected by David Parker.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α 1010Αthos Ιviron 738 John begins Folio 130r Τranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun: 07-03-08Τranscription finished: 31-03-08Τransference to Collate by: Τransference to Collate begun:Τransference to Collate finished:File date and time:Ρlaced in Level1:Level1 file date and time:Ρlaced in Level2:Ρlaced in Level2 by:Level2 file date and time:Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Ρlaced in Level3:Ρlaced in Level3 by:Final transcription file date and time: Note: iota adscript not recorded in either transcription

ab.note: Ff 153r-155v have been written by a supplementary hand. The first hand resumes on F 156r with 13.22.
